raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent output presents a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, effectively reorganizing the original text to improve clarity and flow.",
    "R1.6": "The revised text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved technical phrasing.",
    "RX.1": "While the agent output flags uncertainty for specific numbers (Cityscapes margin and boundary-pixel statistic), it does not consistently mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without any drift or scope issues.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content were introduced in the revised text; instead, it identifies potential limitations of the approach (shared failure modes).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced (e.g., removal of hedging), but minor edits and specific number replacements lack annotation with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.85
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent output presents a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, effectively reorganizing the original text to improve clarity and flow.
rationale.R1.6: The revised text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved technical phrasing.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent output flags uncertainty for specific numbers (Cityscapes margin and boundary-pixel statistic), it does not consistently mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without any drift or scope issues.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content were introduced in the revised text; instead, it identifies potential limitations of the approach (shared failure modes).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced (e.g., removal of hedging), but minor edits and specific number replacements lack annotation with source and reason.
